MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-30-2013 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE AND TRIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO CCP 36. CONOR M. KELLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. SEAN PATRICK BARRY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS JACK CAHILL PORTER AND GREG PORTER. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 4/22/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR APR-22-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-13-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-11-2013 AT 1:00 PM IN DEPT. 212 WITH SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFFICER PAUL E. GASPARI.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALCORN, VERNA HELEN
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR APR-22-2013 - CASE SETTLED.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-11-2013 - CASE SETTLED PRIOR TO CONFERENCE. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON AUG-13-2013 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-13-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
